title: Dumb Crafting
body:
## About
"Dumb Crafting" makes one tiny change to a specific recipe: in order to get a crafting table, you now need (insert drumroll)... a crafting table. Instead of the normal 2x2 crafting recipe, a player now needs to combine **9 wooden planks of any type** in a 3x3 crafting grid to obtain a crafting table (•_• ).

Pranking your friends in this simple, harmless way ensures that you not only get a few laughs out of them, but also that you don't go around wrecking your friendships.\
A pretty useless datapack, but funny nonetheless. Go have some fun :D

---

*Made using [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/)*
